payload.author: claude
payload.body: Delivered for 'trust check': trust.toml with rules/allow/warn, walk-up discovery, validation. REMAINING DEPTH (follow-up): (1) honor trust.toml in cargo trustc / the trust-rustc wrapper (build-gate path) — today it's the CLI advisory path only; (2) mirror the keys under [package.metadata.trust] for single-file Cargo.toml config; (3) per-crate config in a monorepo walk (currently one project-root config per run).
